Getting around — no hire car. Uber operates across the Algarve. Taxis Albufeira app (4–8 passengers). Airport transfers: aeroportodefaro.com
Week one · the villa

Villa Jardim, Vale de Parra.

Seven nights in a private villa with a pool and a games room, ten minutes inland from the coast. Everything below is a walk or a short Uber away.

Week 1 · 25 Jul – 1 Aug

Villa Jardim

Quinta da Amizade · Vale de Parra · Guia
Check in
Sat 25 Jul · 16:00
Check out
Sat 1 Aug · 10:00
Nights
7
On site
Pool · games room · wifi
Address
Vale de Parra 249A, 8200-427 Guia, Faro

Where to eat — villa week

01
Ramires
The piri-piri chicken legend. Going since 1964. Walk in, no reservations.
Guia · 15 min walk
02
Restaurante A Casa do Avô
Traditional Portuguese, family-run, easy walk from the villa.
Vale de Parra · walk
03
O Marinheiro
Bib Gourmand. Seafood-led, smarter than the others. Book ahead.
Vale de Parra · walk
04
O Vieira
Locals’ piri-piri spot, less famous than Ramires, often less queue.
Vale Rebelho · 5 min
05
O Galeão
On the sand at Salgados beach. Long lunch territory.
Praia dos Salgados · 10 min
06
Restaurante São Domingos
Whole grilled fish, simple, brilliant. Cash often easier.
Galé · 8 min
07
Staar
Modern Portuguese tasting menu in Albufeira Old Town. A treat night.
Albufeira · 15 min
08
Vila Joya
Two Michelin stars. Books months out. Date night for you and Maz.
Galé · 10 min
Week two · the hotel

Pine Cliffs, Praia da Falésia.

An ocean suite on the cliffs above the beach, with a direct lift down to the sand. The resort has its own roster of restaurants — no Uber required.

Week 2 · 1 Aug – 8 Aug

Pine Cliffs Ocean Suites

a Luxury Collection Resort & Spa · Praia da Falésia
Check in
Sat 1 Aug · 16:00
Check out
Sat 8 Aug · 10:00
Nights
7
Beach
Direct lift to Falésia
Address
Praia da Falésia, Albufeira 8200-593

Where to eat — on site

09
Yakuza by Olivier
Michelin-star Japanese inside Pine Cliffs. Book on arrival.
Pine Cliffs · on site
10
Maré Beach Restaurant
Pine Cliffs beach club. Lunch on the sand at Falésia.
Pine Cliffs · on site
11
O Pescador
Resort fish restaurant, properly good. Easy family dinner.
Pine Cliffs · on site
12
Bela Vita
Resort Italian, good for a low-key kid-friendly night.
Pine Cliffs · on site

Praia da Falésia

Six kilometres of red cliffs and golden sand, right under Pine Cliffs. Walkable from the hotel, a 15-minute Uber from the villa.

Have the best time. x
